title: Gas in Stomach: 7 Herbal Teas for Older Adults to Ease Discomfort
description: Cynara scolymus teas, also known as artichoke tea, has been traditionally used to help alleviate gas and bloating in the stomach. This is due to the presence of inulin, a type of fiber that acts as a prebiotic, feeding the good bacteria in the gut, promoting a healthy gut microbiome. Additionally, the tea contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory properties that may help soothe the digestive tract and reduce inflammation.
